settings.heading: Guides for setup, workflows, and best practices
settings.copy: Long-form setup and workflow guidance that bridges product selection with real-world use.
settings.support_note: Use guides when you need the full setup path or a workflow-specific walkthrough.

settings.heading: User guides tied to real setups
settings.copy: Browse setup guides by workflow, product family, or the decision you are working through.
settings.source_note: Start with the guide that matches your workflow. Move into manuals or support if the next step is still unclear.

settings.heading: Need a shorter path than a full guide?
settings.copy: Move into compatibility, manuals, or direct support when the guide is more than you need right now.
